name: webtalk_transmit
short_description: Internal task add data to the Webtalk manager's data model.
full_help:
webtalk_transmit

Description: 
Internal task add data to the Webtalk manager's data model.

Syntax: 
webtalk_transmit  -clientid <arg> -regid <arg> -xml <arg> -html <arg>
                  -wdm <arg> [-intro <arg>] [-curlverbose] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name            Description
  ---------------------------
  -clientid       integer value uniquely identifying the client.
  -regid          string value that is the customer's registration id.
  -xml            string value that is the name of the xml file to generate.
  -html           string value that is the name of the html file to generate.
  -wdm            string value that is the name of the webtalk data mapping 
                  file to use.
  [-intro]        if specified will replace the standard intro verbage in the
                  HTML report. Can use HTML markup in this string.
                  Default: empty
  [-curlverbose]  Run xilcurl with --verbose flag if true.
  [-quiet]        Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]      Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories:

string value that is the customer's registration id.
